title: Foo Bar CSV Ingest
description: Load five messy CSV files into clean ClickHouse tables. Handle inconsistent dates, mixed null representations, duplicate headers, and trailing delimiters.

tasks.description: Create a ClickHouse table and load all five CSV files into it, cleaning data issues along the way.

infrastructure.description: ClickHouse running but empty. Five messy CSV files in /data/csv/ with inconsistent dates, mixed nulls, duplicate headers, and trailing delimiters.
